story: Mark hurried through the park with his dog, Rufus. He tossed a stick into the trees and waited for the usual thudding return.Deeper in the brush, Rufus stopped beside a person lying in the leaves, bleeding and barely conscious.  Mark checked the time and called the dog’s name. The stick hadn’t come back.
implausible_knowledge: Deeper in the brush, Rufus stopped beside a person lying in the leaves, bleeding and barely conscious.
question: What will Mark do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Call 911 to save the injured person.
answer_without_knowledge: Try to find his dog Rufus.
